metadata.title: Scroll Offset
metadata.description: Preserve minmium distances before and after cursor.

regex.source: .setDesc("Use percentage offset, or use fixed number of distance instead")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用百分比偏移，或者使用固定的距离数值")

regex.source: .setDesc('unit in "px", or "%" if using percentage offset, 0 to disable this plugin')
regex.target: .setDesc('unit in "px", or "%" if using percentage offset, 0 to disable this plugin')
